testsuite.name: exe.T1
testsuite.system-out: Report configuration started Connected To DataBase Pre-Conditions Satisfied =====amazon Execution STARTED===== =====amazonSUCCESS===== =====flipkart Execution STARTED===== =====flipkartSUCCESS===== Browser Launched Login Successfull =====add2Prod Execution STARTED===== =====add2ProdSUCCESS===== Logged Out Successfully Login Successfull =====add4Prod Execution STARTED===== =====add4ProdSUCCESS===== Logged Out Successfully Login Successfull =====add6Prod Execution STARTED===== =====add6ProdSUCCESS===== Logged Out Successfully Closed the browser Successfully Post-Conditions Satisfied Disconnected To DataBase
